mapper.select: select b.id, b.title, b.content, ( select f.file_path from ggshop.tbl_file f join ggshop.tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFilePath, ( select f.file_name from ggshop.tbl_file f join ggshop.tbl_board_file bf on f.id = bf.id where bf.board_id = b.id order by f.id asc limit 1 ) as representativeFileName, b.board_filter as boardFilter, coalesce( nullif(nullif(m.member_nickname, ''), '닉네임을입력해주세요.'), m.member_name ) as memberName, date_format(b.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as createdDate from ggshop.tbl_board b join ggshop.tbl_member m on m.id = b.board_member_id where b.board_status = 'active' order by b.created_date desc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from ggshop.tbl_board where board_status = 'active'

select c.id, b.id as boardId, b.title as boardTitle, m.member_name as actorName, c.comment_content as commentContent, date_format(c.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdDate from ggshop.tbl_comment c join ggshop.tbl_board b on b.id = c.comment_board_id join ggshop.tbl_member m on m.id = c.comment_member_id where b.board_member_id = #{memberId} and c.comment_member_id != #{memberId} and c.comment_status = 'active' order by c.created_date desc limit #{limit}
